en: Yeah. Baseball can hate him, you know.
One of the great things about money is it buys a lot of things.
One of which is the luxury to disregard what baseball likes, doesn't like, what baseball thinks, doesn't think.
ko: 그 중 하나는 야구가 좋아하는 걸 무시할 수 있는 사치야,

en: Well, I was grateful for the call. You were grateful?
Yeah. For $41 million, you built a playoff team.
You lost Damon, Giambi, Isringhausen, Pena.
And you won more games without them than you did with them.
ko: 그들과 함께한 것보다 그들 없이 더 많은 경기를 이겼어.

en: You won the exact same number of games that the Yankees won, but the Yankees spent $1.4 million per win.
ko: 너는 양키스가 이긴 것과 정확히 같은 수의 경기를 이겼어,

en: I know you're taking it in the teeth out there, but the first guy through the wall, he always gets bloody.
ko: 너가 힘든 상황에 처해 있다는 건 알지만,
